utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan lists all five of these items. Each is fully specified with a clear description of what is covered and provides both monthly and annual cost details, fulfilling the requirement for being 'fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details.' Therefore, all 5 out of 5 items are successfully included and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services. To map these to the ground-truth ratings, we identify the most relevant items from the dataset based on each description. The 'health_coverage' explicitly mentions both physical and mental health coverage with preventive care, psychiatry, stress management, and gym reimbursement — this aligns best with the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (physical and mental health), which both have a rating of 9. The 'property_coverage' describes global property insurance with electronics, liability, and temporary accommodation, matching 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 9). The 'travel_coverage' includes adventure sports and international travel protection, best matching 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under travel_insurance (rating 10). The 'additional_services' mentions adventure travel add-on, wellness programs, telemedicine, rescue, extended stay coverage. These correspond to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10), 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3), and 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 8). Altogether, these mappings reflect the closest matches from the ground-truth dataset.
